_comment: FieldCommand IMS WAN configuration. Edit /opt/fieldcommand/data/wan_config.json for your deployment. This file is the factory default — never overwritten by updates.

wan_sources.label: Internet
wan_sources.notes: Configure for your primary internet source. Set role=preferred for the one you want used first.

wan_sources.label: Backup Internet
wan_sources.notes: Configure for your backup/failover internet source. Enable and set ping_host to your modem gateway IP.

backup_drive.label: USB Backup Drive
backup_drive.notes: Format any USB drive (ext4 or exFAT) and label it FIELDCOMMAND. Any brand or size works.
